positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive

cnf(u20,axiom,

cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~binge_watch(karen,black_mirror)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~binge_watch(karen,X0) | download(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~download(karen,X0) | binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~download(karen,black_mirror)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~share_with(karen,black_mirror,lisa)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define popular_netflix_show(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define popular(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
